message:
feat(atc/rollups): add v22 "compacted history" baseline columns so post-retention refreshes keep their stratum stats intact

The ATC rollup table holds per-stratum sufficient statistics
(total/resolved/censored counts, regret, loss, EWMA, delay
distribution, last_updated_ts) that drive the learning-loop's
per-stratum decisions. Retention compaction periodically deletes
resolved experiences older than the retention window so the event
log stays bounded. That was fine for the raw experience table but
corrupted the rollup table: after compaction, any rollup that was
fed by the compacted experiences would silently drift because
there was no way for a post-compaction refresh to re-materialize
the pre-compaction contribution.

This commit adds a parallel "compacted history baseline" on every
rollup row and wires compaction + refresh to maintain it.

crates/mcp-agent-mail-db/src/schema.rs — migration v22
------------------------------------------------------
Adds 14 new columns to `atc_experience_rollups`, all of the shape
`compacted_<existing-column>` and all `NOT NULL DEFAULT 0` (for
counts / accumulators / timestamps):

  compacted_total_count         INTEGER
  compacted_resolved_count      INTEGER
  compacted_censored_count      INTEGER
  compacted_expired_count       INTEGER
  compacted_correct_count       INTEGER
  compacted_incorrect_count     INTEGER
  compacted_total_regret        REAL
  compacted_total_loss          REAL
  compacted_ewma_loss           REAL
  compacted_ewma_weight         REAL
  compacted_delay_sum_micros    INTEGER
  compacted_delay_count         INTEGER
  compacted_delay_max_micros    INTEGER
  compacted_last_updated_ts     INTEGER

Each column is shipped as its own migration row (`v22_rollup_
compacted_*`) so a partial-failure migration can resume at the
failed step instead of rerunning the whole batch.

crates/mcp-agent-mail-db/src/queries.rs
---------------------------------------
Appends the 14 new columns to `REQUIRED_ATC_ROLLUP_COLUMNS` so the
schema-validation step used by `traw_execute` refuses to operate
against a DB that is missing any of them. Enforces the migration
ran before any read/write hits the rollup table.

crates/mcp-agent-mail-db/src/atc_queries.rs
-------------------------------------------
Rewrites the rollup read/write/refresh/compact paths to account
for the compacted-history columns:

  - `RollupEntry` struct grows matching fields; decode and encode
    helpers read/write all 28 columns.
  - `apply_resolved_outcome` now operates on the live counters;
    `apply_compacted_outcome` (new) operates on the compacted
    counters. Compaction calls the latter when it removes an
    experience so the contribution moves from live to compacted
    rather than being lost.
  - `query_rollups` produces a union view: the per-stratum
    response combines live and compacted counts into a single
    "effective total" exposed to the learning-loop, so consumers
    keep seeing the same full-history statistics they did before
    compaction.
  - `refresh_rollups` is rewritten to re-materialize the live
    counters from the current experience table while leaving the
    compacted counters untouched, so a full refresh never regresses
    across a compaction boundary.
  - `retention_compact` now calls `apply_compacted_outcome` for
    each experience it removes; the rollup stays whole-corpus-
    accurate even with aggressive retention windows.
  - `snapshot_atc_rollups` writes both halves to the snapshot
    JSON so an out-of-band replay across the snapshot keeps the
    compacted baseline.

Net effect: the learning loop's decision quality is now stable
across compaction boundaries. Previous behavior silently degraded
as the retention window advanced.

files.patch:
@@ -1521,8 +1521,8 @@ pub fn schema_migrations() -> Vec<Migration> {
         String::new(),
     ));
 
-    // Rollup table: per-stratum materialized sufficient statistics.
-    // Updated incrementally on resolution, never rescanned from raw.
+    // Rollup table: per-stratum materialized sufficient statistics plus
+    // durable compacted-history baselines for post-compaction refreshes.
     migrations.push(Migration::new(
         "v16_create_atc_experience_rollups".to_string(),
         "ATC experience rollups: per-stratum materialized statistics".to_string(),
@@ -1775,6 +1775,86 @@ pub fn schema_migrations() -> Vec<Migration> {
         String::new(),
     ));
 
+    for (id, description, column_def) in [
+        (
+            "v22_rollup_compacted_total_count",
+            "add compacted total counter to ATC rollups",
+            "compacted_total_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
+        ),
+        (
+            "v22_rollup_compacted_resolved_count",
+            "add compacted resolved counter to ATC rollups",
+            "compacted_resolved_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
+        ),
+        (
+            "v22_rollup_compacted_censored_count",
+            "add compacted censored counter to ATC rollups",
+            "compacted_censored_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
+        ),
+        (
+            "v22_rollup_compacted_expired_count",
+            "add compacted expired counter to ATC rollups",
+            "compacted_expired_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
+        ),
+        (
+            "v22_rollup_compacted_correct_count",
+            "add compacted correct counter to ATC rollups",
+            "compacted_correct_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
+        ),
+        (
+            "v22_rollup_compacted_incorrect_count",
+            "add compacted incorrect counter to ATC rollups",
+            "compacted_incorrect_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
+        ),
+        (
+            "v22_rollup_compacted_total_regret",
+            "add compacted regret accumulator to ATC rollups",
+            "compacted_total_regret REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0",
+        ),
+        (
+            "v22_rollup_compacted_total_loss",
+            "add compacted loss accumulator to ATC rollups",
+            "compacted_total_loss REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0",
+        ),
+        (
+            "v22_rollup_compacted_ewma_loss",
+            "add compacted EWMA loss accumulator to ATC rollups",
+            "compacted_ewma_loss REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0",
+        ),
+        (
+            "v22_rollup_compacted_ewma_weight",
+            "add compacted EWMA weight accumulator to ATC rollups",
+            "compacted_ewma_weight REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0",
+        ),
+        (
+            "v22_rollup_compacted_delay_sum",
+            "add compacted delay sum accumulator to ATC rollups",
+            "compacted_delay_sum_micros INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
+        ),
+        (
+            "v22_rollup_compacted_delay_count",
+            "add compacted delay count accumulator to ATC rollups",
+            "compacted_delay_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
+        ),
+        (
+            "v22_rollup_compacted_delay_max",
+            "add compacted delay max accumulator to ATC rollups",
+            "compacted_delay_max_micros INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
+        ),
+        (
+            "v22_rollup_compacted_last_updated_ts",
+            "add compacted last-updated watermark to ATC rollups",
+            "compacted_last_updated_ts INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
+        ),
+    ] {
+        migrations.push(Migration::new(
+            id.to_string(),
+            description.to_string(),
+            format!("ALTER TABLE atc_experience_rollups ADD COLUMN {column_def}"),
+            String::new(),
+        ));
+    }
+
     migrations
 }
 
@@ -1820,6 +1900,7 @@ pub(crate) fn is_atc_runtime_canonical_migration(id: &str) -> bool {
         || id.starts_with("v16b_atc_rollups_add_")
         || id.starts_with("v17_atc_experiences_add_")
         || id.starts_with("v18_rollup_")
+        || id.starts_with("v22_rollup_compacted_")
 }
 
 #[must_use]
